note: Phase 13 D8 -- KASE/threshold/certification regression evidence keys. Every number below was MEASURED by services.datasets.dataset_validator.DatasetValidator.validate_golden_scores against the real services.kase_scoring + services.threshold_model + services.kase pipeline (see tests/datasets/test_golden_responses.py), never hand-asserted. See validate_golden_scores's own docstring for the [PROPOSAL ruling] on why these use a synthetic one-scenario-per-competency construction (test_session28_kase_integration.py's proven technique) rather than routing through a real dataset package's KRA-generated scenarios: the Power BI Dashboard profile only ever yields 3 coarse scenarios spanning 6 of the 9 catalog competencies, which makes anything but a clean Ready/Not-Ready sweep structurally unreachable. [PROPOSAL ruling, OIF Chunk 3 reconciliation]: the catalog now has 12 real competencies (was 9) -- every strategy below now explicitly lists all 12, and the expected_* values were re-measured against the reconciled catalog.

responses.name: ready_all_demonstrated
responses.description: Every one of the 12 config.COMPETENCY_CATALOG competencies Demonstrated -- the clean-sweep case, mirrors test_session28_kase_integration.py's SET_B.

responses.name: not_ready_critical_gate_failure
responses.description: exception_handling and decision_making (both critical) score Partial/Missing -- OIS itself is well above the 75 threshold (80.83, since every other competency including the other 4 criticals is Demonstrated) but the Critical Competency Gate forces Not Ready regardless, proving gates outrank raw score. Mirrors test_session28_kase_integration.py's SET_A.

responses.name: conditionally_ready_boundary_zone
responses.description: All 6 critical competencies score 100 (gate passes), but three non-critical competencies (tool_proficiency, risk_awareness, knowledge_stewardship) are Missing and one (communication) is Partial, dragging OIS to 74.17 -- inside [threshold-3, threshold) = [72, 75) -- which resolves to Conditionally Ready with no certification (74.17 is below the Bronze floor of 75).
